text:
President Trump said on social media that the U.S. military had conducted a large bombing raid on Friday on Kharg Island, a key port and Iran’s oil export hub. Trump said the raid had “totally obliterated” military forces on the island, but that he had directed the Pentagon not to damage its oil infrastructure, “for reasons of decency.” The global price of oil has surged by 40 percent since the United States and Israel began the war with Iran last month.
The Israeli military said it launched a new wave of strikes on Tehran at approximately 10 p.m. local time. Residents in the Iranian capital reported heavy explosions.
title: Britain warns its citizens in Dubai they could be jailed for sharing photos of damage from airstrikes.
